question_text: What is the name of your favorite restaurant?
On a scale of 1 to 5, with 1 being "very poor" and 5 being "excellent," how would you rate the overall food quality at your favorite restaurant?
How often do you typically visit your favorite restaurant?
What is your favorite dish to order at the restaurant?
How would you describe the ambiance of the restaurant?
How would you rate the service at the restaurant?
What is the price range of your average meal at the restaurant?
Would you recommend this restaurant to others? Why or why not?
Does the restaurant have a rewards program?
Do you think the restaurant is worth the money?
